entities.name: ONLINE WEATHER PREDICTION TOOL
entities.description: A tool used to predict weather patterns to identify similar climate scenarios across different timeframes

entities.name: RIC4REC PROJECT
entities.description: A project that identifies communities experiencing current weather and climate scenarios similar to future projections

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the RIC4REC project is identifying communities

entities.name: WEATHER AND CLIMATE SCENARIOS
entities.description: Environmental patterns and conditions experienced by communities

entities.name: FARMS OF THE FUTURE
entities.description: An approach that connects farmers facing current climate risks with those who may face them in the future to improve adaptation capacity

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: The Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research, the organization that developed the Farms of the Future approach

entities.name: CCAFS
entities.description: The research programme on Climate Change, Agriculture and Food Security that developed the Farms of the Future approach

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that communities need to adapt to

entities.name: CLIMATE RISKS
entities.description: Potential negative impacts resulting from climate change that farmers confront

entities.name: CLIMATE STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental pressures caused by climate change that farmers seek to tackle
